title: Congress of Mossenden
content:
The Congress of Mossenden (2015) was a diplomatic agreement in which Cleo Ashford, peace delegate of Commonwealth of Tallmere, helped finalize terms at Zephyr Bay.

Signing and terms.

The Congress of Mossenden was signed in Zephyr Bay on 14 September 2015. The agreement established trade corridors and a joint commission chaired initially by Cleo Ashford.

Historical assessment.

Modern historians view the Congress of Mossenden as a stabilizing milestone, crediting Cleo Ashford's insistence on verifiable inspection clauses.
